kinds.title: kind: action
kinds.description: A concrete thing to do that the wiki tracks. Cross-cuts kinds — an action can target any catalog entry. Phase 8 workflow primitive: turns documentation into a cockpit.

kinds.title: kind: api
kinds.description: A named API surface — produced by a repo (or resolved from a consumer reference).

kinds.title: kind: decision
kinds.description: Structured architecture/business decision record (ADR/BDR). Formalizes the existing free-form narratives/decisions/ content with options + choice + consequences. Phase 8.

kinds.title: kind: experiment
kinds.description: A hypothesis-driven trial. Distinct from action (an action is execution; an experiment tests an unknown). Phase 8 workflow primitive.

kinds.title: kind: external
kinds.description: Third-party / partner system the company integrates with (Stripe, Sentry, a partner API …).

kinds.title: kind: infra
kinds.description: Cloud or managed-service primitive (AWS EKS, RDS, S3; GCP Firestore; on-premise …).

kinds.title: kind: product
kinds.description: Customer-facing physical or digital product. May compose multiple repos.

kinds.title: kind: repo
kinds.description: Catalog entry for one source-code repository. Lives at catalog/repos/<name>/catalog-info.json.

kinds.title: kind: service
kinds.description: Software the company deploys but did not write (no own source repo). Keycloak, MongoDB, Artemis, …

kinds.title: kind: signal
kinds.description: Something noticed but not yet acted on. Lives between observation and action. Phase 8 workflow primitive — Brain's notebook for 'we should look at this'.

kinds.title: kind: system
kinds.description: A logical system (C4 Level 1 box). Aggregates catalog entries that share the same `system` value.

kinds.title: kind: team
kinds.description: R&D org unit. Owns repos via `repoTeamMatch[]` until the stitcher derives ownership inversely.

kinds.title: kind: telemetry-event
kinds.description: One observation of something happening in Brain — skill completion, chat query, lint finding, schema validation event, edge-pattern detection, query-gap. Substrate for /brain-evolve.
